full_text:
Liang Xing 梁興
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Xing (梁興). One of Han Sui’s Eight Knights. Killed by Ma Chao in an attempt to protect Sui. Liang Xing was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty. Liang Xing lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
